headline: Why Is Robinhood (HOOD) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of financial services company Robinhood (NASDAQ:HOOD) jumped 10.2% in the afternoon session after the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) eliminated the $25,000 pattern day trader rule, a move seen as a major win for retail trading platforms.

content.title: Why Is Robinhood (HOOD) Stock Rocketing Higher Today

headline: SEC Rule Shift Puts Robinhood’s Growth And Valuation In Focus
summary: The SEC has removed the $25,000 pattern day trader rule, allowing more frequent trading for smaller retail accounts. This change directly affects platforms built around active trading, including Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD). The new framework is expected to reshape how retail brokerage platforms approach margin, risk controls, and user engagement. Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD), trading at $87.32, is at the center of this change because its core users have historically been smaller,...

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher As Bond Yields Ease
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Apr, 16 2026 E-mini S&P 500 futures are slightly higher ahead of the open, as investors weigh calmer bond markets against fresh signs of cost pressure. The US 10 year Treasury yield is sitting near recent lows, helped by progress in Iran US talks and softer oil prices, which eases worries about borrowing costs for households and businesses. At the same time, US import prices rose 0.8% in March, mainly because of fuel, which suggests that...

headline: SoFi Technologies Pops 5% as Short Squeeze Chatter and Earnings Anticipation Heat Up
summary: SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI) stock rose 5% on Wednesday morning, climbing from $18.79 to $19.70 in the premarket hours. Two forces are driving the action: retail community chatter about a potential short squeeze and building anticipation ahead of Q1 2026 earnings scheduled for April 29. With the stock still down 28% year-to-date, traders are watching closely ... SoFi Technologies Pops 5% as Short Squeeze Chatter and Earnings Anticipation Heat Up

headline: What Drove The Sell-off In Robinhood Stock?
summary: Robinhood (HOOD) stock collapsed about 30% over the last five months, with its forward P/E multiple getting slashed from a lofty 60x to just about 41x. This happened even as total revenues grew over 25% in the same period.

content.title: What Drove The Sell-off In Robinhood Stock?
content.summary: Robinhood (HOOD) stock collapsed about 30% over the last five months, with its forward P/E multiple getting slashed from a lofty 60x to just about 41x. This happened even as total revenues grew over 25% in the same period.

headline: Why Loosening Rules for Day Traders Is a Victory for Brokers
summary: Traders with less than $25,000 in assets in their margin accounts had been banned from making more than four trades across a five-day period.

content.title: Why Loosening Rules for Day Traders Is a Victory for Brokers
content.summary: Traders with less than $25,000 in assets in their margin accounts had been banned from making more than four trades across a five-day period.
